omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We may also use your hashed and encrypted email address to identify and reach potential new customers who may share interests and/or behaviour similar to yours. We do so, for example, by creating segments and audiences and sharing this with platforms like Google, Meta or Amazon, where they can identify so-called lookalikes. With the support of Google, Meta or Amazon functionality, our ads are displayed to users in these audiences. It is a way to increase the efficiency of our marketing effort.
